description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows, especially prominent on the rear and side facades, allowing for ample natural light. The exterior is finished with a combination of light gray and white materials, complemented by dark accents around the garage and window frames. The property includes a driveway leading to a spacious garage, a backyard with a swimming pool, and a covered patio area with outdoor seating. The landscaping is simple, with neatly trimmed grass and several trees and hedges surrounding the building. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and clean geometric lines.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a garage, a backyard pool, and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage entrance, and main entryway framed by trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the expansive glass windows, backyard pool, and patio seating area.
description_view_2: Side-rear view displaying the covered patio, pool, and additional outdoor lounge furniture.
description_view_3: Side view with visible windows, flat roof, and a clear view of the building's length and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on rear and side facades
